zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave於1485年12月19日出生在英國藍卡爾瓦頓時，他的父親Robert Kytson25歲，母親Margaret Smyth21歲。他於1523年與Margaret Donnington在英國素福爾可亨格拉福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年9月11日在英國素福爾可亨格拉福享年54歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可亨格拉福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave于1485年12月19日出生在英国藍卡爾瓦頓时，他的父亲Robert Kytson25岁，母亲Margaret Smyth21岁。他于1523年与Margaret Donnington在英国素福爾可亨格拉福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年9月11日在英国素福爾可亨格拉福享年54岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可亨格拉福。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Kytson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): patronymic meaning ‘son of Kit’, a pet form of Christopher and Christian .
Irish (Wicklow): Anglicized form of Mac Ceit or Ó Ceit, see Kett .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ivan   or   Evan  , as in the case of the American film actor  Van Heflin  (  1910–71 , born  Emmett Evan Heflin ) and the Northern Irish singer  Van Morrison  (  b. 1945  as  George Ivan Morrison ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave was born on 19 December 1485, in Warton, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert Kytson, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Smyth, was 21. He married Margaret Donnington in 1523, in Hengrave, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 11 September 1540, in Hengrave, Suffolk, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Hengrave, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave est né le 19 décembre 1485, à Warton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Kytson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Smyth, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Donnington en 1523, à Hengrave, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 11 septembre 1540, à Hengrave, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Hengrave, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave am 19. Dezember 1485 in Warton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Kytson 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Smyth 21. Er hat 1523 in Hengrave, Suffolk, England Margaret Donnington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 11. September 1540 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hengrave, Suffolk, England und wurde in Hengrave, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave è nato il il 19 dicembre 1485 nel Warton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert Kytson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Smyth, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Donnington nel 1523, nel Hengrave, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 11 settembre 1540, nel Hengrave, Suffolk, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Hengrave, Suffolk, England.

ja.St John Laterans Church, Hengrave, Suffo: イギリススフォルクヘングラブ
ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengraveが1485年12月19日にイギリスランカシュアイアワートンで生まれた時，父Robert Kytsonは25歳，母Margaret Smythは21歳であった。1523年にイギリススフォルクヘングラブでMargaret Donningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年9月11日にイギリススフォルクヘングラブで54歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヘングラブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave(이)가 1485년 12월 19일 영국 랭카실르 워턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Kytson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Smyth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1523년 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브에서 Margaret Donnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 9월 11일 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브에 묻혔다.

mn.19 December 1485–11 September 1540: 1485 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 19–1540 оны Есдүгээр сарын 11

pt.19 December 1485–11 September 1540: 19 de dezembro de 1485–11 de setembro de 1540
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave nasceu em 19 de dezembro de 1485, em Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Kytson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Smyth, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Donnington em 1523, em Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1540, em Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave родился 19 декабря 1485 г. в местности вартон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Kytson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Smyth, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Donnington в 1523 г. в местности хенграв, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 сентября 1540 г. в местности хенграв, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности хенграв, суффолк, Англия.

es.19 December 1485–11 September 1540: 19 de diciembre de 1485–11 de septiembre de 1540
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave nació el 19 de diciembre de 1485, en Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Kytson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Smyth, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Donnington en 1523, en Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1540, en Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
